name: How long does it take to see results from AEO best practices?

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to see results from AEO best practices?

acceptedAnswer.text: No single timeline is guaranteed, because AEO depends on crawl frequency, competition, and how quickly engines trust your page. Simple improvements like rewriting answers, adding FAQ structure, and improving schema can help sooner, but earning consistent citations usually takes ongoing optimization and content refreshes.
acceptedAnswer.description: Some AEO changes can help quickly, but reliable visibility usually takes time. Expect results to depend on crawl speed, content quality, and how competitive the topic is.
